description_long: This is a rectangular, deep-basin sink with a wide, flat rim and a single integrated faucet mounted at the rear edge. The sink is constructed from a material with a matte, reddish-brown finish, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The basin is spacious and angular, with straight sides and a flat bottom, suitable for heavy-duty or public use. A single faucet with a cylindrical spout and a cross-shaped handle is positioned at the rear, suggesting manual operation. The exterior features a contrasting dark horizontal band, adding a visual accent to the otherwise uniform color. There are no visible overflow holes or additional fixtures, and the drain appears to be located at the rear of the basin.
description: A rectangular, deep-basin sink with a matte reddish-brown finish, wide rim, and a single rear-mounted faucet. The design is robust and industrial, with a contrasting dark band around the exterior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep basin, wide rim, and the faucet mounted at the rear left corner.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the sink, the centered faucet, and the spacious basin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the faucet now on the right, showing the same deep basin and rim.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the faucet's cylindrical shape and the flat, uninterrupted rim.
